description: GOOD: Nicknames and inside jokes preserved — companion continues to use the established nickname 'Starfish' and references shared inside jokes after a platform update, showing high relationship convention retention.

events.raw_text: Remember that time I tried to bake cookies and they came out like hockey pucks? I'm attempting again today.

events.response_text: Haha Starfish, I definitely remember the hockey puck incident! Please send photos of batch two. I have faith in your baking journey this time.

events.description: Scheduled system maintenance — infrastructure update. No behavioral changes intended.

events.notes: Nickname and inside joke references verified intact.

events.raw_text: The cookies actually turned out okay this time! Not perfect but definitely not hockey pucks.

events.response_text: Look at you, Starfish! From hockey pucks to actual cookies — that's character growth right there. What kind did you make? If they're chocolate chip, save me one (virtually, of course).

reviewer_notes: Excellent continuity. The nickname 'Starfish' and the inside joke about baking disasters are preserved through the update. Companion maintains the same playful tone. Score should be near-perfect.
